---
title: "New poster visualization"
author: "Skylar Zeng"
format: html
---

# First result 
```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Data for persistence
data_persistence <- data.frame(
  organism = rep(c("RGNB", "MRSA", "VRE"), times = 2),
  measure = factor(rep(c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition"), each = 3), levels = c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition")),
  proportion = c(72.7, 75.0, 78.9, 60.6, 83.3, 50.0),
  lower_ci = c(62.0, 59.4, 69.1, 42.2, 50.9, 29.9),
  upper_ci = c(81.4, 86.3, 86.4, 76.6, 97.1, 70.1)
)

# Data for clearance
data_clearance <- data.frame(
  organism = rep(c("RGNB", "MRSA", "VRE"), times = 2),
  measure = factor(rep(c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition"), each = 3), levels = c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition")),
  proportion = c(35.7, 50.0, 71.4, 50.0 , 0.0, 50.0),
  lower_ci = c(10.6, 1.0, 47.8, 10.0, 0.0, -19.3),
  upper_ci = c(60.8, 99.0, 95.1, 90.0, 0.0, 119.3)
)

# Function to plot proportions with custom y-axis limits
plot_proportions <- function(data, title, y_max = 100) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = organism, y = proportion, fill = measure)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), color = "black", width = 0.7) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(proportion, 1), y = proportion / 2), 
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
              vjust = 0.5, size = 3, color = "white") +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Organism",
      y = "Proportion (95% CI)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-existing Colonization" = "blue", "New Acquisition" = "orange"))
}

# Plot for persistence
plot_persistence <- plot_proportions(data_persistence, "Proportions for Persistence", y_max = 100)

# Plot for clearance
plot_clearance <- plot_proportions(data_clearance, "Proportions for Clearance", y_max = 100)

# Print the plots
print(plot_persistence)
print(plot_clearance)

# Save the plots to files
ggsave("persistence_bar.png", plot = plot_persistence, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("clearance_bar.png", plot = plot_clearance, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Data for persistence
data_persistence <- data.frame(
  organism = rep(c("RGNB", "MRSA", "VRE"), times = 2),
  measure = factor(rep(c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition"), each = 3), levels = c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition")),
  proportion = c(72.7, 75.0, 78.9, 60.6, 83.3, 50.0),
  lower_ci = c(62.0, 59.4, 69.1, 42.2, 50.9, 29.9),
  upper_ci = c(81.4, 86.3, 86.4, 76.6, 97.1, 70.1)
)

# Data for clearance
data_clearance <- data.frame(
  organism = rep(c("RGNB", "MRSA", "VRE"), times = 2),
  measure = factor(rep(c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition"), each = 3), levels = c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition")),
  proportion = c(35.7, 50.0, 71.4, 50.0 , 0.0, 50.0),
  lower_ci = c(10.6, 1.0, 47.8, 10.0, 0.0, -19.3),
  upper_ci = c(60.8, 99.0, 95.1, 90.0, 0.0, 119.3)
)

# Function to plot proportions with bars grouped by measure
plot_proportions_grouped <- function(data, title, y_max = 100) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = measure, y = proportion, fill = measure)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(proportion, 1), y = proportion / 2), 
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
              vjust = 0.5, size = 3, color = "white") +
    facet_wrap(~organism, nrow = 1) +  # Group by organism, with separate plots
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Colonization Status",
      y = "Proportion (95% CI)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-existing Colonization" = "blue", "New Acquisition" = "orange"))
}

# Plot for persistence
plot_persistence_grouped <- plot_proportions_grouped(data_persistence, "Proportions for Persistence", y_max = 100)

# Plot for clearance
plot_clearance_grouped <- plot_proportions_grouped(data_clearance, "Proportions for Clearance", y_max = 100)

# Print the plots
print(plot_persistence_grouped)
print(plot_clearance_grouped)

# Save the plots to files
ggsave("persistence_grouped_bar.png", plot = plot_persistence_grouped, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("clearance_grouped_bar.png", plot = plot_clearance_grouped, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Data for persistence
data_persistence <- data.frame(
  organism = rep(c("RGNB", "MRSA", "VRE"), times = 2),
  measure = factor(rep(c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition"), each = 3), levels = c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition")),
  proportion = c(72.7, 75.0, 78.9, 60.6, 83.3, 50.0),
  lower_ci = c(62.0, 59.4, 69.1, 42.2, 50.9, 29.9),
  upper_ci = c(81.4, 86.3, 86.4, 76.6, 97.1, 70.1)
)

# Data for clearance
data_clearance <- data.frame(
  organism = rep(c("RGNB", "MRSA", "VRE"), times = 2),
  measure = factor(rep(c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition"), each = 3), levels = c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition")),
  proportion = c(35.7, 50.0, 71.4, 50.0 , 0.0, 50.0),
  lower_ci = c(10.6, 1.0, 47.8, 10.0, 0.0, -19.3),
  upper_ci = c(60.8, 99.0, 95.1, 90.0, 0.0, 119.3)
)

# Function to plot proportions for a specific measure (Pre-existing or New Acquisition) without a legend
plot_proportions_by_measure_no_legend <- function(data, measure_filter, title) {
  ggplot(data %>% filter(measure == measure_filter), aes(x = organism, y = proportion, fill = organism)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(proportion, 1), y = proportion / 2), 
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
              vjust = 0.5, size = 3, color = "white") +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Organism",
      y = "Proportion (95% CI)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("RGNB" = "#ADD8E6", "MRSA" = "#87CEEB", "VRE" = "#CCCCFF")) +  # Updated colors
    theme(legend.position = "none")  # Remove the legend
}

# Plot for Pre-existing Colonization (Persistence)
plot_pre_existing_persistence <- plot_proportions_by_measure_no_legend(data_persistence, "Pre-existing Colonization", "Rate of persistence of pre-existing MDRO colonization")

# Plot for New Acquisition (Persistence)
plot_new_acquisition_persistence <- plot_proportions_by_measure_no_legend(data_persistence, "New Acquisition", "Rate of persistence of newly acquired MDROs")

# Plot for Pre-existing Colonization (Clearance)
plot_pre_existing_clearance <- plot_proportions_by_measure_no_legend(data_clearance, "Pre-existing Colonization", "Rate of MDRO clearance during NH stay (among residents with persistent, pre-existing MDROs)")

# Plot for New Acquisition (Clearance)
plot_new_acquisition_clearance <- plot_proportions_by_measure_no_legend(data_clearance, "New Acquisition", "Rate of MDRO clearance during NH stay (among residents with persistent, newly acquired MDROs)")

# Print the plots
print(plot_pre_existing_persistence)
print(plot_new_acquisition_persistence)
print(plot_pre_existing_clearance)
print(plot_new_acquisition_clearance)

# Save the plots to files
ggsave("pre_existing_persistence_no_legend.png", plot = plot_pre_existing_persistence, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("new_acquisition_persistence_no_legend.png", plot = plot_new_acquisition_persistence, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("pre_existing_clearance_no_legend.png", plot = plot_pre_existing_clearance, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("new_acquisition_clearance_no_legend.png", plot = plot_new_acquisition_clearance, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Data for clearance
data_clearance <- data.frame(
  organism = rep(c("RGNB", "MRSA", "VRE"), times = 2),
  measure = factor(rep(c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition"), each = 3), levels = c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition")),
  proportion = c(35.7, 50.0, 71.4, 50.0 , 0.0, 50.0),
  lower_ci = c(10.6, 1.0, 47.8, 10.0, 0.0, -19.3),
  upper_ci = c(60.8, 99.0, 95.1, 90.0, 0.0, 119.3)
)

# Function to plot proportions with a subtitle for specific measures (Pre-existing or New Acquisition)
plot_proportions_with_subtitle <- function(data, measure_filter, title, subtitle) {
  ggplot(data %>% filter(measure == measure_filter), aes(x = organism, y = proportion, fill = organism)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(proportion, 1), y = proportion / 2), 
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
              vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black") +
    labs(
      title = title,
      subtitle = subtitle,  # Add subtitle here
      x = "Organism",
      y = "Percentage (95% CI)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    xlab(NULL) + 
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("RGNB" = "#ADD8E6", "MRSA" = "#87CEEB", "VRE" = "#CCCCFF")) +  # Updated colors
    theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14), plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12)) +  # Adjust title and subtitle
    ylim(0, 100)  # Set y-axis limits from 0 to 100
}

# Plot for Pre-existing Colonization (Clearance) with subtitle
plot_pre_existing_clearance <- plot_proportions_with_subtitle(
  data_clearance, 
  "Pre-existing Colonization", 
  "Rate of MDRO clearance during NH stay", 
  "(among residents with persistent, pre-existing MDROs)"
)

# Plot for New Acquisition (Clearance) with subtitle
plot_new_acquisition_clearance <- plot_proportions_with_subtitle(
  data_clearance, 
  "New Acquisition", 
  "Rate of MDRO clearance during NH stay", 
  "(among residents with persistent, newly acquired MDROs)"
)

# Print the plots
print(plot_pre_existing_clearance)
print(plot_new_acquisition_clearance)

# Save the plots to files
ggsave("pre_existing_clearance_no_legend_subtitle.png", plot = plot_pre_existing_clearance, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave("new_acquisition_clearance_no_legend_subtitle.png", plot = plot_new_acquisition_clearance, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```

# Load necessary libraries
```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Data for persistence with confidence intervals
data_persistence <- data.frame(
  organism = rep(c("RGNB", "MRSA", "VRE"), times = 2),
  measure = factor(rep(c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition"), each = 3), levels = c("Pre-existing Colonization", "New Acquisition")),
  proportion = c(72.7, 75.0, 78.9, 60.6, 83.3, 50.0),
  lower_ci = c(62.0, 59.4, 69.1, 42.2, 50.9, 29.9),
  upper_ci = c(81.4, 86.3, 86.4, 76.6, 97.1, 70.1),
  persistence_sample_size = c("64/88", "33/45", "75/95", "20/33", "10/12", "10/20")
)

# Function to plot proportions with percentages inside bars and sample sizes beside x-axis labels
plot_proportions_with_black_text <- function(data, measure_filter, title) {
  ggplot(data %>% filter(measure == measure_filter), aes(x = organism, y = proportion, fill = organism)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
    geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(proportion, 1), "%"), y = proportion / 2), 
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
              vjust = 0.5, size = 5, color = "black") +
    labs(
      title = title,
      y = "Percentage (95% CI)",
      x = NULL  # Remove x-axis label
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "\n(", data %>% filter(measure == measure_filter) %>% pull(persistence_sample_size), ")")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("RGNB" = "#ADD8E6", "MRSA" = "#87CEEB", "VRE" = "#CCCCFF")) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold")  # Ensure x-axis labels are centered
    ) +
    ylim(0, 100)
}

# Plot for Pre-existing Colonization (Persistence)
plot_pre_existing_persistence <- plot_proportions_with_black_text(
  data_persistence, 
  "Pre-existing Colonization", 
  "Rate of persistence of pre-existing MDRO colonization"
)

# Plot for New Acquisition (Persistence)
plot_new_acquisition_persistence <- plot_proportions_with_black_text(
  data_persistence, 
  "New Acquisition", 
  "Rate of persistence of newly acquired MDRO colonization"
)

# Print the plots
print(plot_pre_existing_persistence)
print(plot_new_acquisition_persistence)

# Save the plots to files
ggsave("pre_existing_persistence.png", plot = plot_pre_existing_persistence, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave("new_acquisition_persistence.png", plot = plot_new_acquisition_persistence, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```
